repos.description: Fast stable diffusion on CPU and AI PC

repos.name: local-dream
repos.description: Run Stable Diffusion on Android Devices with Snapdragon NPU acceleration. Also supports CPU/GPU inference.

repos.name: ComfyUI_UltimateSDUpscale
repos.description: ComfyUI nodes for the Ultimate Stable Diffusion Upscale script by Coyote-A.

repos.name: StableAvatar
repos.description: We present StableAvatar, the first end-to-end video diffusion transformer, which synthesizes infinite-length high-quality audio-driven avatar videos without any post-processing, conditioned on a reference image and audio.
